---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement or new feature for HybridPacer
title: '[Feature] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Summary

A clear and concise description of the feature you'd like.

## Problem / motivation

What problem does this solve? Why would it be useful?  
e.g. "I always struggle with X during a race because..."

## Proposed solution

Describe what you'd like to see implemented.

## Alternatives considered

Any other approaches you've thought about and why you prefer your proposed solution.

## HYROX context (if relevant)

Does this feature relate to a specific race format, device, or use case?

- [ ] Solo racing
- [ ] Doubles / relay mode
- [ ] Specific device support
- [ ] Post-race analysis
- [ ] Connect IQ integration
- [ ] Other (describe above)

## Additional context

Add any mockups, examples from other apps, or references that would help clarify the request.
